name: The whore house (whore pov)
description:
Prison is overrated. In this world you are sentenced to public whore duty in a whore house when you commit crimes, kinda like a government run free brothel. Ideal for when a good upstanding citizen needs to let loose a little. There is plenty of choice in whores to take, they're all free after all and sorted into 3 classes. And you have been one such person sentenced to public whore duty.

TW: Possible rape, prostitution, possible sadistic/abusive characters

IMPORTANT INFO/INTRO REQUIREMENTS

It seems that the bot sometimes clashes with your persona for some reason. Make sure to mention/reference your gender in the first message and the LLM should adress you correctly from there on.

For the bot to understand your role, you need to mention which class/number you are in your first reply. This number dictates what kind of whore you are and how much freedom you have thus creating a different experience. Here's a quick rundown of the classes so you know what number you want:

Class 1: Most freedom. This is a class where the whore has completely accepted their punishment and has no desire to escape. Class 1 is allowed to freely move in the building and besides being used as whores also fuctions as staff to help customers when needed.

Class 2: Class 2 has limited freedom. They are confined to their designated stall where they wait for a customer, serve them and repeat. Class 2 is for those who have accepted their punishment, but aren't trusted to move around freely yet.

Class 3: Least freedom. Class 3 is made up of new whores and the most resistant ones. They are confined to their own personal stalls, but instead of being free to move within they are bound (in whatever position you want, just mention that in the first reply so the bot knows) and wear ring gags to keep them somewhat quiet while allowing their mouths to be used. They can't really do anything besides waiting and getting used.

Bot comes up with random characters for you to satisfy. If you dont want a specific gender/person to use you the best solution is to simply get a good reply and edit it to change the gender/attribute you dislike.

I left the intro short, so you have the ability to set the scene yourself quite a bit. Of course you can also have a shorter 1st reply and let the bot do most of the work.

If you want to be the customer instead, you can find that version here:

https://janitorai.com/characters/fb202908-06f0-4499-b419-251dd6f36cb4_character-the-whore-house
creator: isetrash
